headline: Cummins: Running On All Engines, But Valuation Makes It A 'Hold'
summary: Cummins Inc. stock remains a "Hold" as the valuation looks stretched. Click here to learn more about CMI and its outlook.

headline: Cummins: A Return To Growth Solidifies The Bull Case
summary: Cummins (CMI) rated Buy: Power Systems surge and data center demand drive FY26 growth, margin expansion despite engine headwinds.
